title: Super Ninja Fruit Fly Trap - 2 pack, Highly Effective Fruit Fly Killer for Home & Kitchen, Up to 3 Weeks of Performance per Bottle, Child & Pet Friendly
bullet_points: Highly Effective & Reliable Fruit Fly Catcher: This fruit fly trap for indoors is expertly engineered to stop fruit flies where they hover most—kitchen counters, trash bins, and near fruit. See results in just 24 hours! Note: This trap is for fruit flies, and will not work for gnats

Natural Attractant That Actually Works: Our fruit fly traps use a natural liquid bait that mimics the odour of decaying fruit to quickly lure flies. No harsh smells or chemicals—just clean, safe, and powerful fruit fly control for any indoor space.

Extended Protection - Up to 3 weeks: Enjoy long-lasting protection with our fruit fly traps Each bottle offers up to 3 weeks of continuous coverage—just place it in high-traffic areas and let the powerful trap do the work.

Safe Around Kids & Pets: Made with natural, non-toxic ingredients, this fruit fly catcher for indoors is safe to use around kids and pets. No need to stress about dangerous chemicals in your home—this fruit fly trap is a safe, effective, and family-friendly way to deal with annoying flies.

Sustainable Fruit Fly Trap Trap Design: This is more than just an effective fruit fly trap—it’s a planet-friendly solution. The liquid bait is crafted from natural ingredients, and the bottle and packaging are made with recycled materials, so you can keep your home free from flies while keeping waste to a minimum.
